message:
fix(safety): safe integer casts in indexer + rounding fix in analytics

src/indexer/mod.rs:
- Add message_id_from_db() and saturating_u32_from_i64() helper
  functions for safe i64→u64 and i64→u32 conversions, replacing bare
  "as" casts that would silently wrap on negative or overflowing values
- Change the semantic embedding pipeline from .map() to .filter_map()
  so messages with out-of-range IDs are logged and skipped rather than
  producing corrupted u64 message IDs
- Apply saturating casts for agent_id and workspace_id fields

src/analytics/query.rs:
- Add .round() before "as i64" cast on coverage percentage values in
  both Track A and Track B breakdown readers to prevent silent
  truncation (e.g., 49.7% was being cast to 49 instead of 50)
- Replace filter_map(|r| r.ok()) with explicit row error propagation
  in query_unpriced_models() — silently swallowing row-read errors
  hid database corruption or schema mismatches

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
